title: Daewoo Essentials Handheld Blender, 350W, Detachable Blending Rod For Easy Cleaning, 2 Speeds, Diamond Cut Stainless Steel Blades, Stick Blender, Compact Design, White
features: POWERFUL VERSATILITY – With 2 speed settings, a pulse function, and 350W of power, this blender is perfect for everything from silky smoothies to hearty soups
QUICK AND EASY CLEANING – The detachable blending rod ensures you can clean up effortlessly, making meal prep even more convenient
SHARP PRECISION – Durable diamond-cut stainless steel blades deliver consistent and efficient blending, even with tough ingredients
COMPACT CONVENIENCE – Its sleek, space-saving design fits comfortably in your hand and stores easily in your kitchen
description: The Daewoo Stick Blender is your ultimate kitchen companion for quick, convenient, and versatile meal prep. Perfect for busy parents whipping up baby food, fitness enthusiasts crafting protein-packed smoothies, or home chefs blending silky soups, this compact blender does it all. With its detachable blending rod, cleaning up is a breeze, just detach the rod and clean in warm soapy water. Whether you’re making a morning smoothie or an evening sauce, its 2 speed settings and pulse function give you precise control, while the 350W motor powers through everything from soft fruits to tough veggies. Crafted with diamond-cut stainless-steel blades, this blender ensures consistent, smooth results every time. Purée hearty vegetable soups for cozy winter dinners or blitz ice for refreshing summer drinks effortlessly. Its compact design fits snugly in your hand, ensuring comfort and ease during use, and it’s small enough to store in any kitchen cupboard. Whether you’re blending for one or prepping for a family feast, the Daewoo Stick Blender is the reliable, space-saving solution you’ve been looking for. Simple, efficient, and stylish, it’s the must-have tool for anyone who loves fresh, homemade meals at their fingertips.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Detachable blending rod, Diamon cut stainless steel blades, 2 Speed settings, Pulse function, 350w power, Compact design
